PURSUANT TO CRC 3.827 (A), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ADRIATIC INSURANCE COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FREEMAN, AMBER NICOLE $4,939.28 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,939.28, EACH PARTY SHALL BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS OF SUIT.
